content:
<USER_REQUEST>
# Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform â€” Feature Implementation Prompt

> **How to use:** Paste this entire prompt into your AI code editor (Cursor, Windsurf, v0, Copilot, etc.).
> It is self-contained. All content, data, copy, and logic specs are embedded.
> Do NOT modify existing files unless explicitly stated â€” only add new files/components.

---

## CONTEXT

You are extending an existing carbon footprint awareness web application.
The app already has a base layout, routing, and authentication.
Your job is to implement **7 new feature modules** as independent, self-contained components/pages.
Each module must be addable via a new route and a nav link â€” zero changes to existing files unless a route registration is needed.

Stack assumption: React + Tailwind CSS (adjust imports to match the project's actual stack if different).
Use TypeScript where the project already does. Use the project's existing UI component library if present (shadcn/ui, MUI, etc.), otherwise build with Tailwind utility classes.

Color theme: greens and earth tones. Primary: `#2D6A4F`. Accent: `#52B788`. Background: `#F8FAF5`. Text: `#1B4332`.

---

## SHARED DATA & CONSTANTS

Create a file `src/data/carbonData.ts` with the following exports. **Do not overwrite if it exists â€” merge.**

```ts
// Emission factors (kg CO2e per unit) â€” source: IPCC AR6 / GHG Protocol
export const EMISSION_FACTORS = {
  // Transport (per km)
  car_petrol: 0.192,
  car_diesel: 0.171,
  car_electric: 0.053,
  bus: 0.089,
  train: 0.041,
  flight_short: 0.255,   // <3hr
  flight_long: 0.195,    // >6hr
  motorbike: 0.114,

  // Energy (per kWh)
  electricity_grid: 0.233,
  natural_gas: 0.202,
  coal: 0.820,
  solar: 0.041,
  wind: 0.011,

  // Food (per kg)
  beef: 27.0,
  lamb: 39.2,
  pork: 12.1,
  chicken: 6.9,
  fish: 6.1,
  dairy: 3.2,
  eggs: 4.8,
  vegetables: 2.0,
  fruits: 1.1,
  legumes: 0.9,
  rice: 2.7,

  // Shopping (per item approx)
  clothing_item: 15.0,
  electronics_phone: 70.0,
  electronics_laptop: 300.0,
  furniture_ite
<truncated 21907 bytes>
).filter(Boolean);
      for (const line of lines) {
        if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
          try {
            const data = JSON.parse(line.slice(6));
            if (data.type === 'content_block_delta') {
              const chunk = data.delta?.text || '';
              fullText += chunk;
              onChunk(chunk);
            }
          } catch {}
        }
      }
    }
    return fullText;
  }

  const data = await response.json();
  return data.content?.[0]?.text || '';
}
```

---

## GENERAL IMPLEMENTATION RULES

1. Every page must have a `<title>` meta or `document.title` set (e.g. "AI Coach | EcoTrack").
2. Every page must be responsive â€” mobile-first. Sidebar layouts collapse to tabs on mobile.
3. All monetary values display in â‚¹ (Indian Rupee).
4. All CO2 values display as "X kg CO2e" or "X tonnes CO2e" â€” always include the unit.
5. Empty states must have an illustration (emoji-based) and a helpful prompt.
6. Loading states: show a skeleton or spinner with a green pulse animation.
7. Error states: friendly message + retry button. Never show raw API errors to the user.
8. Use `localStorage` to persist: recent scanner searches, joined challenges, cart items, user footprint values.
9. Do not install new npm packages unless strictly necessary. Use what's already in package.json.
10. All pages export a default component. No named-only exports for page components.

---

*Generated for: Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform*
*Emission data sources: IPCC AR6, GHG Protocol, Our World in Data*
*API: Anthropic Claude (claude-sonnet-4-20250514)*
build it without ignoring any of the info in the prompt
</USER_REQUEST>
